Log.Location: "I805 N Sr94 E Con / I805 N Sr94 Con"

details.IncidentDetail: "[1] BLK NINJA MC 1000 // OOG IN GP WHERE LANES OF CON MERGE // DRVR IS 1023 ON RHS 94 E JWO EUCLID"
"[7] PER PUBLIC WORKS OFF OFR TO GET OO THE WAY ON CAMINO DEL SUR BY THE CIRCLE K PLOT JSO THE EXIT "
"[1] WHI SD CITY PUBLIC WORKS TK VS SIL HOND CRV 7ESM219"
"[2] VEH IS 1124 / POSS HAPPENED LAST NIGHT"
"[1] CDF SD ROLLED UP ON TC "
"[21] 87-9 ADV DURING TRAFFIC BREAK THERE WAS NO OBSERVED TIRE IN RDWY [Shared]"
"[18] PER ANOTHER RP ADV WIDE LOAD TRLR PULLED OVER ON H ST OFR // TIRE ENDED UP ON WB LANES OF H ST [Shared]"
"[11] A87-009 VEH MOVE TO RS MAKING CONTACT C4 [Shared]"
"[10] A87-009 ALL LNS STOPPED MOVING VEH FM CD TO RS [Shared]"
"[2] UNK WHERE TIRE ROLLED TO OR WHERE VEH STOPPED "
"[1] FULL TIRE CAME OFF A SIL HOND CIV IN #1"
"[1] MZP4 ADV WILL BE WORKING CRACKED CEILING , SB 5 NO HARBOR , WILL HAVE THE #1 LN BLOCKED // TIL APPROX 1330"
"[3] 108-S2 WILL BE JAM RD JEO 94 / WILL HAVE THE #3 LANE CLOSED FRM CUYAMACA COLLEGE W TO SR94 STARTING 0500 FOR PAVING"
